items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Exceptions
items.description: Fork-specific exceptions including TransactionTypeError, TransactionGasLimitExceededError (EIP-7825), BlobGasLimitExceededError, BlobCountExceededError, InitCodeTooLargeError, and others.

items.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Fork (Entry Point)
items.description: Main fork entry point. Defines state_transition, validate_header, apply_body, check_transaction. Includes constants: MAX_BLOCK_SIZE=10MiB (EIP-7934), MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE=8MiB, BLOB_COUNT_LIMIT=6. Implements calculate_base_fee_per_gas and calculate_excess_blob_gas.
